boxDescription: The driver’s side fuse block is to the left of the steering wheel, under the instrument panel. Snap off the cover to reveal the fuses. You’ll find a fuse puller clipped to the inside of the cover. Place the wide end of the fuse puller over the plastic end of the fuse. Squeeze the ends over the fuse and pull it out.

boxDescription: Additional fuses are located in the relay center, on the passenger’s side, below the instrument panel. You must remove the sound insulator on the right side of the passenger footwell to replace these fuses.
